prompt: A student answered 'earth' for הארץ in Genesis 1:1. Which diagnostic note fits best?
choices: Student missed the definite article ה.
Student missed prefixed ו as a conjunction.
Student missed the masculine plural ending ים.
Student did not recognize את as a direct-object marker.
correct_answer: Student missed the definite article ה.
accepted_answers: Student missed the definite article ה.

distractors.text: Student missed prefixed ו as a conjunction.
Student missed the masculine plural ending ים.
Student did not recognize את as a direct-object marker.

feedback_incorrect: Review how prefixed ה changes a bare noun into a definite noun.
